description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Evennia test-suite and coveralls that runs on push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7 and 3.8 and databases sqlite3, postgresql, and mysql. For each matrix combination, check out the code, set up Python, start and configure the database server, install dependencies, set up Evennia, and run tests. For one specific matrix combination, also run Coveralls and Codacy coverage.
